BOU.name: Bournemouth
BOU.note: Manager change: Iraola → Marco Rose. Tactical reset · apply 0.8× discount until pre-season friendlies confirm system.

CHE.name: Chelsea
CHE.manager: Xabi Alonso CONFIRMED (NEW · ex-Real Madrid · ex-Leverkusen)
CHE.note: Manager change: Maresca → Xabi Alonso CONFIRMED (coming from Real Madrid, where his system made Carreras a 9.5 MOTM LB). Possession-system rooted in his Leverkusen 24/25 title campaign. 8 WC reps (R.James, P.Neto, Hato, Cucurella, Enzo F., Gusto, Caicedo, M.Sarr · Lavia DROPPED from revised BEL squad). CHE-owned loanees (Páez, Penders, Jackson) not counted for PL fatigue. Apply 0.8× discount until Alonso's system + first-XI confirmed in pre-season friendlies. Cole Palmer (no WC fatigue · TUCHEL SNUB) + Caicedo central to whatever Alonso builds — both rested-premium opener candidates.

CRY.name: Crystal Palace
CRY.manager: Pierre Sage (STRONG RUMOR · ex-Lens · in negotiations) · Glasner leaving
CRY.note: Manager change: Glasner confirmed leaving Palace. Pierre Sage (ex-Lens · ex-Lyon) in advanced negotiations — ready to say yes since last week per source. Sage's profile = vertical/transition football, similar to what made Lyon over-perform early in 24/25. Combined with 10 WC reps (sole 4th-heaviest — entire CRY first XI in WC service) = max compound risk. Apply 0.85× — could drop to 0.8× if Sage's PL learning curve adds variance.

FUL.name: Fulham
FUL.manager: TBD (Marco Silva → Benfica · CONFIRMED leaving after 5 years)
FUL.note: Manager change CONFIRMED: Marco Silva departs Fulham after 5 years to replace Mourinho at Benfica. Replacement TBD. Apply 0.8× discount until new manager + system confirmed in pre-season friendlies. FUL also has 4 WC reps (Berge/Bobb · NOR + Diop · MAR + Castagne · BEL) compounding the transition risk.

HUL.name: Hull City (Promoted)
HUL.note: Note: Heavy rotation tax — Jakirovic rotated Hughes, Giles, Slater between matches in Championship. Avoid as starters in opening 26/27 squad.

LEE.name: Leeds (Promoted Champions)
LEE.note: Promoted as Championship 25/26 champions. Manager continuity. GK: Karl Darlow was #1 for most of promotion season → likely stays #1 for 26/27 PL return. Meslier (backup) CONFIRMED LEAVING end of 25/26 (contract expired). 3 WC reps (Gudmundsson SWE LB, Tanaka Ao JPN CDM, Aaronson USA MID). Darlow as nailed-ish #1 GK is potential budget FPL gem (£4-4.5m).

LIV.name: Liverpool
LIV.note: MAJOR REGIME CHANGE CONFIRMED: Slot departed despite winning 25/26 PL title (Arsenal won, not LIV). Andoni Iraola officially announced (ex-BOU). Iraola's profile = high-press · vertical · transition football — fits Kerkez attacking-WB role, Isak's mobility, Wirtz as #10 in transition. But: Iraola has never managed at top-6 level. Combined with 8 WC reps (Wirtz/Alisson/van Dijk/Gravenberch/Gakpo/Mac Allister/Isak/Endō) + 5 gold-pick departures CONFIRMED (TAA, Salah, Robbo, Konaté, Quansah-already gone) = HIGH-VARIANCE. Salah's exit confirms the full rebuild — front-3 has to be rebuilt entirely. Apply 0.8× until system + first-XI confirmed in pre-season friendlies.

MCI.name: Man City
MCI.manager: Maresca (STRONG RUMOR · ex-CHE) · Pep gone · Hugo Viana DoF
MCI.note: Major rebuild: Pep + Bernardo + KDB + Walker + Grealish + Stones (CONFIRMED leaving) all gone. Hugo Viana (ex-Sporting Portugal DoF · joined MCI ~1 year ago) driving the rebuild — close friend of Amorim from Sporting days but Amorim NOT going to MCI · Maresca remains the strongest rumor for the manager seat. 17 WC reps (SOLE HEAVIEST · Doku BEL revised IN + Khusanov + Semenyo + Stones-departure). Apply 0.8× discount. Haaland's auto-default captain status broken. Academy: Mukasa (back at MCI · contract to 2030).

MUN.name: Man Utd
MUN.note: Carrick rebuild + Casemiro CONFIRMED leaving (destination TBD) + Rashford RETURNING from Barcelona loan. 12 WC reps (Mainoo, Rashford, Bruno F., Dalot, Cunha, L.Martínez, Mazraoui, Lammens, Ugarte, Bayindir, Amad, T.Fletcher) = sole 3rd-heaviest behind MCI 17/ARS 15. RB hierarchy under Carrick: Dalot > Mazraoui. 🆕 RESTED PREMIUM: Mbeumo (CMR didn't qualify) = full pre-season rest, zero WC fatigue — likely Carrick's preferred wide attacker. Apply 0.85× cluster but Mbeumo himself is exempt.

NEW.name: Newcastle
NEW.note: Heavy squad churn for 26/27: 8+ confirmed outgoings (Gordon → Barcelona, Krafth + Trippier + Targett + Ruddy + Thompson released, Ramsdale loan-return, Hernes → Groningen). GK position partially resolved: Ewen Jaouen (young French GK from Reims · long-term contract) signed — likely Pope still #1, Jaouen development backup. 7 WC reps (Livramento, Burn, Thiaw, Woltemade, Bruno G., Elanga, Wissa COD). Apply 0.85× until incomings clarify.

NFO.name: Nott'm Forest
NFO.manager: Vítor Pereira (continuity · in role since ~Feb 2026 · half-season pedigree)
NFO.note: Vítor Pereira (Portuguese · ex-FC Porto · ex-Wolves) has been Forest manager since ~Feb 2026. Half-season already played under him → continuity for 26/27 (Nuno Espírito Santo left mid-25/26, now at WHU Championship). 3 WC reps (E.Anderson ENG, Ndoye SUI, Gunn SCO). Sels was BEL-revised dropped — remains the rested-premium GK pick. Boly leaving CB depth. NFO is one of the cleaner continuity targets for 26/27 openers given Sels gold-pick status.

SUN.name: Sunderland
SUN.note: SUN was in PL 25/26 (not promoted · clarified Jun 2026). Per official club news Jun 2026: 9 WC reps across 4 continents (Diarra SEN, Xhaka SUI captain, Brobbey + Roefs NED, Alderete PAR, Talbi MAR, Isidor HAI, Angulo ECU, Sadiki COD). Loanees Masuaku (Lens) + Adingra (Monaco) NOT counted unless return. 4th-heaviest tied with CHE/AVL. Apply 0.9× — no longer a 'clean continuity' target.

TOT.name: Tottenham
TOT.manager: Roberto De Zerbi (3-4 games in) · IF SURVIVES
TOT.note: Multiple loan-status TBC for 26/27: Palhinha (Bayern, Sporting linked), Tel (Bayern?), Kolo Muani (PSG?). Cross-reference at late-June squad reveal.

WHU.name: West Ham 🔻
WHU.manager: Nuno Espírito Santo (ex-NFO · joined for Championship 26/27)
WHU.note: 26/27 status: West Ham in Championship after relegation. Nuno Espírito Santo joins as manager (left NFO mid-25/26 cycle? — actually left NFO end of 25/26 for Championship rebuild). Veteran arrivals: Trippier (ex-NEW), Jiménez (ex-FUL, return), Adama Traoré + Fabiański leaving. PL-clause exits expected (Bowen?). WHU non-PL — off FPL planning beyond tracking PL-bound poaches.
